reviews.review_description:
This is a fantastic piece of software the 3D conversion is incredible, In addition it also converts your  PC to instant 3D  so you can watch a 2D movie on your PC an it will be in 3D simply magical! (the code to pair my PC was always there)*********************BUT*****************************

If I rave why only 3 stars? Well simply put its the subscription and lack of contact from the DEV. The pricing is fine £6, £10 , £36 per month for various access, you can also get them billed yearly at a slightly lower price or £180 and its yours forever.  
************************************************************************************
I don't need this on a full time basis and paying monthly as and when seemed like a nice idea but the general feedback is its very difficult to cancel the monthly subscription, there is no cancel or opt out button. You have to email the DEV and again reviews have stated they do not answer their emails and you keep getting billed.  I have asked this question over on discord and as of yet I've had no answer from the DEV.
************************************************************************************
I get it that this type of technology doesn't come cheap and it is amazing but the DEV needs to take time to answer simple questions.
The code for linking the quest-app with the pc-app doesn't show up on the pc.

reviews.review_title: Works, makes me excited about 3d and VR
reviews.review_description: I didn't have any issues with the code, but I have a lifetime license from the Kickstarter and PC + Quest 2 are on the same network with no VPNs so I wonder if any of that makes a difference. But the realtime conversion works shockingly well and makes me excited for 3D and VR again. We're loading up stuff nonstop just to see how it looks in stereo. Way easier than VorpX or the other drivers I have for stereo game conversion; this "just works." Love it!

Wouldn't recommend this. No matter what I do i can't get the desktop application to ever display a link code that this application asks for. I have everything connected the way described on this store page and the way the website says but no luck.
